# JMRH Publications — Journal of Multidisciplinary Research Horizon

## About
JMRH Publications is a peer-reviewed, open-access academic journal publishing multidisciplinary research across Commerce, Management, Economics, Education, Social Sciences, Science & Technology, Environmental Studies, and more.

- **Website**: https://jmrh.lovable.app
- **Contact**: submissions@jmrh.in

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://jmrh.lovable.app/
- About the Journal: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/about
- Submit Manuscript: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/submit
- Archives: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/archives
- Author Guidelines: https://jmrh.lovable.app/journal/guidelines
- Contact: https://jmrh.lovable.app/contact
